top.title: PowerShell switch/quoting misuse
top.prevention: On Windows, prefer `node scripts/...` over nested powershell -Command. Never assign values to switch parameters. Use .ps1 files for multi-statement scripts; escape $ as `$ inside double-quoted -Command strings.

top.title: next/dynamic ssr:false in Server Component
top.prevention: Never use next/dynamic with { ssr: false } inside Server Components. Import client leaves statically when browser work is already behind useEffect.
top.snippet: ssr: false is not allowed with next/dynamic in Server Components

top.title: WSL System32 bash wins over Git on Windows Machine PATH
top.prevention: ROOT CAUSE: bare bash was WSL System32 before Git. Fix: Admin scripts/fix-windows-bash-path.ps1 prepends Git\bin to Machine PATH. Verify where bash + agentos:health bash.ok. Policy ROOT_CAUSE.md.
top.snippet: The system cannot find the file specified when hooks call bash; where bash shows System32\bash.exe first

top.title: Semgrep Guardian PreToolUse blocks all edits when not logged in
top.prevention: Semgrep Guardian blocks Write/Edit when not logged in. Log into guardian MCP for real scans, or accept non-blocking policy with explicit product decision — do not leave unexplained permanent disable.
top.snippet: Not logged into Semgrep Guardian decision block on Write/Edit

top.title: Stale process PATH after Machine PATH fix
top.prevention: After Machine PATH fix, fully restart IDE/agent shells. agentos:health uses registry PATH for bash.ok. Stale process PATH is expected until restart.
top.snippet: Registry has Git first but long-lived IDE/agent still resolves System32 bash until full restart
